text:
- [escalation] Tavily: Failed Tavily payment of $47.12 due to unsuccessful credit card charge.
- [escalation] Tavily: Tavily notification that a pay-as-you-go charge was unsuccessful, likely due to expired card or insufficient funds.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions failure notification for jeeves-unchained Loop Monitor workflow.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence digest indicating 3 alerts from lang.mc@gmail.com requiring attention.
- [escalation] Google Play: Google One subscription suspended due to declined payment method.
- [escalation] Google: Google security alert about new sign-in to glenam98@gmail.com account.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions failure for jeeves-unchained Daily Pipeline workflow.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert indicating permanent failure of Daily Pipeline with no auto-retry.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run failed.
- [reply needed] Zamzar: Zamzar billing service requesting updated payment details due to a billing issue.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch sharing video content and notes, requesting review before Thursday.
